ddls:
CREATE TABLE "forum_posts" (
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each post */,
  "msg_id" TEXT /* Message ID of the post */,
  "parent_id" TEXT /* Parent post ID (if it's a comment) */,
  "link_id" TEXT /* Link ID of the post */,
  "forum" TEXT /* Forum category of the post */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the post was made */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the post */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the author */,
  "activity" INTEGER /* Activity score of the author */,
  "merit" INTEGER /* Merit score of the author */,
  "trust" REAL /* Trust score of the author */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the post */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the post */,
  "scam_header" INTEGER /* Scam header flag */,
  "post_type" TEXT /* Type of the post (e.g., announcement, discussion, comment) */,
  "post_status" TEXT /* Status of the post (e.g., active, deleted, pending review) */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of views the post has received */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the post has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the post has received */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the post has been reported */,
  "is_sticky" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is sticky (pinned to the top) */,
  "is_locked" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post is locked (no further comments allowed) */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the post has been edited */,
  "edit_time" TEXT /* Time the post was last edited */,
  "edit_user" TEXT /* User who last edited the post */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("post_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_forum_posts_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES users ("username")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the user */,
  "activity" INTEGER /* Activity score of the user */,
  "merit" INTEGER /* Merit score of the user */,
  "trust" REAL /* Trust score of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "join_date" TEXT /* Date the user joined the forum */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "profile_picture_url" TEXT /* URL of the user's profile picture */,
  "about_me" TEXT /* Brief description about the user */,
  "banned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is banned */,
  "ban_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the ban (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "post_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the forum_posts table */,
  "author" TEXT /* Author of the comment */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the comment was made */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body of the comment */,
  "like_count" INTEGER /* Number of likes the comment has received */,
  "dislike_count" INTEGER /* Number of dislikes the comment has received */,
  "report_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the comment has been reported */,
  "is_edited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the comment has been edited */,
  "edit_time" TEXT /* Time the comment was last edited */,
  "edit_user" TEXT /* User who last edited the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES users ("username"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_post_id FOREIGN KEY ("post_id") REFERENCES forum_posts ("post_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object to store role permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_map" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the users table */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the user_roles table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
